title: Implement /msg resource handlers per LCI spec
description: Implement /msg/inbox, /msg/sent, /msg/ack CoAP resources per LCI spec 17.5.7. POST to /msg/sent queues outbound message, GET /msg/inbox retrieves inbound (with Observe for push), POST /msg/ack acknowledges receipt. CBOR format with destination, payload, timestamp, status.
acceptance_criteria: Messages can be sent via POST, received via GET/Observe, acknowledged; round-trip test with 2 nodes
close_reason: Already implemented: coap_msg.c (840 lines), POST/GET /msg/sent, GET/Observe /msg/inbox, POST /msg/ack
